description: You are a Flight Activities Officer drafting the Artemis V Lunar Orbit Insertion (LOI) Sequence of Events. Format the plain text document at /home/ga/Documents/artemis_loi_soe.odt into a mission-critical checklist. The formatting must include: a centered, bold title of at least 16pt; 'Heading 1' style for the three main phase headings; a structured table converted from the '|' delimited timeline block; monospace font for the 8 telemetry commands; and bold text with 0.5 inch margin indents for the 2 'WARNING:' blocks. Additionally, format the 3 'CRITICAL GO/NO-GO:' phrases in bold and italic, and insert a Table of Contents between the title block and Phase 1. Save the completed document.

metadata.title_text: Artemis V Lunar Orbit Insertion (LOI) Sequence of Events
